states.name: Kaguya
states.title: Princess of the Black Moon
states.description: A girl descended upon a land in a remote corner of Eastland. An old man who found her sleeping, eyes closed. When he went to help her, he soon realized the incurable disease afflicting him had vanished. In time, people came to worship her as a god, and a small village was established around her.

states.name: Kaguya
states.title: Princess of the Black Moon
states.description: Her true name is NA91. The cleansing power that led people to treat her as a god was originally given to her to neutralize the poison of her predecessor, NA88. She set foot on earth for one mission alone—to build a land where a new species could thrive after humanity perished.

states.name: Kaguya
states.title: Princess of the Black Moon
states.description: "Expendable"—that was the other name given to her. Launched to Erden from another star, she carried only enough fuel for a one-way trip. Once she fulfilled her mission, that would be the end. Merely a tool. She was never meant to harbor feelings for anyone.
